retry_reason: Failure is due to invalid input (NULL ops) or memory allocation failure (kzalloc returns NULL) — neither condition improves with a simple retry; caller should handle error at a higher level.
contract_summary: Allocates and initializes a new cache_coherency_ops_inst object, returning it to the caller with a reference count of 1 (via kref_init). The caller receives ownership of the reference and must eventually call a corresponding kref_put to release the object when no longer needed. The object's ops pointer is set to the provided ops and its node list is initialized. Returns NULL on invalid input (ops or ops->wbinv is NULL) or allocation failure. Caller must check the return value before using the object.

check.reason: kref_init sets cci->kref.refcount.refs to 1. The access path starts from the return value cci and traces through cci->kref->refcount->refs, matching the callee info. The segment count (4) equals the type chain length (4). The 'set' direction is correct for kref_init.
